title: hydrangea serrata var. thunbergii
intro: Hydrangea serrata var. thunbergii, also known as Thunberg's hydrangea or Japanese mountain hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Hydrangea genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea serrata var. thunbergii include its ability to support kidney function, relieve digestive issues, and reduce blood pressure, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Hydrangea serrata var. thunbergii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
